title: phyllanthus subapicalis subsp. subapicalis
intro: Phyllanthus subapicalis subsp. subapicalis is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, specifically found in the tropical regions of Thailand and Malaysia, and is also known as the "Bengkung" plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to protect the liver and reduce oxidative stress in the body. The health benefits of Phyllanthus subapicalis subsp. subapicalis include its ability to treat various liver and digestive disorders, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat liver and digestive issues, as well as to promote overall well-being.
